column2: Put the Fifo design in reset state before applying any inputs
ND_start should be single pulse in entire proof
write enable should be zero in FSM “start” state
When Active low synchronous reset is asserted the write ponter should be zero in next cycle
When Active low synchronous reset is asserted the read ponter should be zero in next cycle
When Active low synchronous reset is asserted the output full condition should be zero
When Active low synchronous reset is asserted the output empty condition should be one
write pointer should always less than the depth of the fifo
The write pointer increment restricted to change by +1 or hold to previous value
The read pointer increment restricted to change by +1 or hold to previous value
Empty condition should be high when (wptr == rptr)   condition is satisfied
Empty condition should be Low when (wptr != rptr)   condition is satisfied
Full condition should be High when  (wptr + 1  == rptr) condition is satisfied
Full condition should be Low when  (wptr + 1  != rptr) condition is satisfied
Full and empty condition should be nutually exclusive
When the depth of the fifo is 1 and rd_en the dout should be equal to stored data at ND_start
